posts.author: HSPl
posts.text: *CPCL – Financial highlights* *Q4 Financial Highlights* *PBT: ₹ 1890.40Cr* *PAT: ₹ 1399.70* Year Ended: *PBT: ₹ 4121.62cr* *PAT: ₹ 3061.85Cr* Crude throughput- ever highest 11.71 MMTPA. One of the best ever physical performance eventhough March month has crude availability issue due to Iran war.
